movable_parts.name: caster_wheels
movable_parts.motion: Four caster wheels (wheel1_01 to wheel4_01) that both swivel 360 degrees around a vertical axis and roll continuously around a horizontal axis.
movable_parts.axis: Z for swivel, perpendicular axis for roll

movable_parts.name: bedbase_01
movable_parts.motion: The entire bed platform raises and lowers vertically via a telescoping hydraulic mechanism.

movable_parts.name: panelsection3_01
movable_parts.motion: The backrest panel pivots upwards from a flat position.

movable_parts.name: panelsection1_01
movable_parts.motion: The leg/foot rest panel pivots to raise or lower the patient's legs.

movable_parts.name: side_rails
movable_parts.motion: Two side rails (rail1_01, rail2_01) fold down from a vertical (up) position to a horizontal (down) position.

movable_parts.name: rail3_01
movable_parts.motion: The end rail (headboard/footboard) folds down from a vertical (up) position.

movable_parts.name: ivpole_pipe2_01
movable_parts.motion: The inner tube of the IV pole telescopes vertically to adjust its height.

movable_parts.name: foot_pedals
movable_parts.motion: Seven foot pedals (pedal1_01 to pedal7_01) that depress to activate functions like brakes or height adjustments.

special_notes: The four wheels are casters, each with two degrees of freedom: swivel (Z-axis rotation) and roll (rotation around the wheel's axle). The bed's articulation (height, backrest, leg rest) is typically powered and not free-moving. The side rails likely have a locking mechanism to hold them in the upright position.
